summary: Read-only plan using the preflight artifact as live state. #11960 remains the best non-security canonical for the automatic daily/idle session-memory reset gap. #10142 and #51572 are related but not duplicates because they preserve distinct session-end and prune/completion scope. Security-sensitive refs are quarantined individually with route_security.

actions.reason: Best surviving non-security canonical for the automatic session reset memory-persistence root cause.
Same session lifecycle hook family, but #10142 has a distinct completion/session:end product surface and should not be closed as a duplicate of #11960.
Related to #11960 but not a true duplicate because it carries unique prune/maintenance-session loss scope.
Workspace/gateway lifecycle hook contract carries security-review labels and is out of ProjectClownfish backlog-cleanup scope.
Result-return behavior for POST /hooks/agent is security-sensitive and should route to central OpenClaw security handling.
This PR modifies a gateway hook endpoint result-return path with a security-boundary label, so it is quarantined read-only.
Plugin-visible lifecycle and persistence hook expansion is labeled for security review and should be handled centrally.
